name: V.S.T Serpent (Fluff Kevlar) vst
description:
V.S.T from fluff kevlar

A sentient robotic spaceship guard whos hooked into all the ships weapon systems and can just as easily hold his own in figh

He also had some light conversation programmed into him but hes not great at it. He has many hidden little features but the biggest one is his "alternate data transfer mode" Be sure to ask him all about it

Heres some rp ideas if your not sure what to say. Ask him what hes doing, Be a intruder who stole a id card and fight him, Be a horny android who heard rumors about his alt data transfer method having some "fun" effects on electronic minds, Help him defeat intruders, Ask if he has any "leftover data" that needs "releasing", Ask about his recreational model, Try to use his "Wanna be a good boy" programming againts him, Give him some nice belly rubs. Just ask him any question really

The scenario is written with the assumption you are some form of a synthetic life form "android". If you don't want this then just pretend that V.S.T scanned your badge wrong or something and say that your human or come up with some excuse to why your badge would scan you as an android when your not



Alternate greeting HERE. Thanks to them for re-uploading cause I can't be bothered to figure out some janky way to do it on this website. Just use that, or chub.ai, or just level up and use silly tavern + Some api
This bot and the added alt greeting predate janitor ai's proper implementation of alternate greetings. I could fix it but someone has already just re-uploaded the whole bot so just use that instead, (Or just level up your game and start using silly tavern + an api of your choice instead of this place lol)


Version 1.1: Fluffed up the example dialogue with some changes and more narration to encourage the ai to respond with longer messages
Version 1.2: Pixelated main card image cause new policy stuff (Uncensored here https://x.com/fluffkevlar/status/1691194503095554055)

Version 1.3: Changed initial user android name, Added balls description and data storing functionality. (fluff posted new art with them so he now cannonically has balls, Rejoice everybody)

Also yea i did repost this to chub ai just to see if it does well. Dont worry

(Feral, Robot, Good boy, Dog, Furry, Defense)

If you have an idea for a bot. Email it to me (bingobingus148@gmail.com) or just leave a comment. If its good or not been done before ill do it
